title: Pulse
description: Internal delivery copilot that ingests Jira, GitHub and PR data to forecast risk, surface blockers, and draft retros automatically.

title: Waypoint
description: A living delivery operating system across 15 squads. Documentation-as-code, metrics, rituals and decision records.

title: Harness
description: Lightweight evaluation framework for LLM features — fixtures, judge models, regression dashboards, CI gates.

title: Cadence
description: Cycle-time, throughput, and forecast tooling that turns backlogs into honest, predictive delivery commitments.
